title: ITI Jobs 2026 – Apprentices
applyMode: Online only – via Surat Municipal Corporation website (https://www.suratmunicipal.gov.in/Information/Recruitment) after mandatory NAPS portal registration
shortInfo: SMC Apprentices Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 1000 vacancies across Surat. Candidates with Any Graduate, B.Sc, ITI, diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 01-06-2026, and closes on 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through SMC website, suratmunicipal.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: SMC Apprentices Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 1000 Posts
basic_details.application_mode: Online only – via Surat Municipal Corporation website (https://www.suratmunicipal.gov.in/Information/Recruitment) after mandatory NAPS portal registration
basic_details.short_information: SMC Apprentices Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 1000 vacancies across Surat. Candidates with Any Graduate, B.Sc, ITI, diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 01-06-2026, and closes on 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through SMC website, suratmunicipal.gov.in.

application_fee.details: The notification does not mention any application fee for this apprentice recruitment. Candidates should refer to the official notification on the SMC website for any updates before applying.

age_limit.details: Candidates must be a minimum of 18 years and must not exceed 34 years of age. Age relaxation will be as per Government of India / Government of Gujarat guidelines for reserved category candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: ITI Trade Pass (for trades 1–9) OR relevant graduation/degree as specified trade-wise (for trades 10–14). Refer vacancy table for trade-specific qualification details.
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as per the Apprentices Act, 1961 and the provisions of this notification. Mandatory registration and eKYC update on the NAPS portal (https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in) must be completed before applying on the SMC website. Candidates must apply only through the SMC official website after completing NAPS registration.

salary_details.salary: Rs. 9,600/- per month (ITI trades – Health Sanitary Inspector, Computer Operator); Rs. 10,560/- per month (ITI trades – Electrician, Fitter, Draughtsman, Surveyor, Mechanic); Rs. 12,300/- per month (Graduation/Degree level trades)

how_to_apply: Printed copy of the online application form
All original educational qualification certificates and mark sheets (ITI Trade Certificate / Degree Certificate as applicable to the trade applied for)
Date of Birth certificate / School Leaving Certificate
NAPS portal registration and eKYC completion proof
Self-attested copies of all above documents
important_instructions: THIS IS NOT A PERMANENT EMPLOYMENT. The apprenticeship period is as per the contract generated on the Government website and candidates will be immediately discharged on completion of the apprenticeship period.
Mandatory NAPS portal registration with eKYC update must be completed before applying on the SMC website. Applications submitted without prior NAPS registration will not be processed.
Candidates who have already completed an apprenticeship in any trade are not eligible — online contract generation will not be possible for such candidates.
Stipend payable to apprentices is subject to Government policy and guidelines as amended from time to time.

Document verification date and intimations will be sent only to the registered mobile number and email ID provided in the application. In case of change in mobile number or email, SMC will not be responsible for any future communication gaps.
Candidates must appear for document verification with both original documents and self-attested copies. Absence from document verification will result in automatic cancellation of candidature.

If, during scrutiny of application form and documents, any candidate is found not meeting the eligibility criteria under the Apprentices Act or the notification provisions, or if any discrepancy is found between the application and original certificates, candidature will be cancelled at any stage.
If a candidate leaves the apprenticeship before completion of the period, the contract will be terminated.
The Appointing Authority (SMC) reserves full rights to cancel this notification, cancel any trade, or make any modifications for any reason without being obligated to provide reasons for the same.

click_here.text: Download Surat Municipal Corporation Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Surat Municipal Corporation Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for Surat Municipal Corporation Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is 10 June 2026 up to 11:00 PM.

faq.question: How many vacancies are there in SMC Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 1000 apprentice vacancies across 14 different trades under Surat Municipal Corporation.

faq.question: What is the application mode for Surat Municipal Corporation Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is online only through the SMC website after completing mandatory NAPS registration.

faq.question: What is the stipend for SMC Apprentice posts in 2026?
faq.answer: The monthly stipend ranges from ₹9,600 to ₹12,300, depending on the ITI or degree-level trade.

faq.question: What are the eligibility criteria for Surat Municipal Corporation Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Indian citizens aged 18–34 years, with ITI trade pass or relevant degree as per the trade and must be registered on the NAPS portal.

faq.question: Is NAPS registration mandatory for SMC Apprentice 2026 application?
faq.answer: Yes, NAPS portal registration and eKYC completion on apprenticeshipindia.gov.in are mandatory before applying on the SMC website.

faq.question: Can candidates who have already completed an apprenticeship apply for SMC Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates who have already completed any apprenticeship under the Apprentices Act are not eligible, as a new contract cannot be generated.

faq.question: What is the selection process for Surat Municipal Corporation Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is merit-based followed by document verification, and there is no written examination.
